executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
TARGET: LIVE PRODUCTION. Use base URL https://www.furqan.today for everything (the apex https://furqan.today 307-redirects to www, so always use www). This is a Vercel deployment, so the login bot-check works normally here (unlike local).

LOGIN (do this first in tests that need auth):
1. Navigate to https://www.furqan.today/login
2. Fill the email and password fields, submit the form. Login succeeds on production.
CREDENTIALS by role:
- student → "test-student@furqan.test" / env:TEST_STUDENT_PASSWORD
- teacher → "test-teacher@furqan.test" / env:TEST_TEACHER_PASSWORD
- admin → NO credentials; skip admin-only tests.

IMPORTANT — these are production-safe tests only. Do NOT perform any state-mutating action (no checkout, no payments, no creating bookings/records). Read/session flows only.

Per-test expectations:
- TC001 Student sign-in: log in as student → lands on an authenticated dashboard (URL leaves /login). PASS = reaching the authenticated area.
- TC002 Teacher sign-in: log in as teacher → teacher dashboard. PASS = authenticated area.
- TC004 Logout: log in (student) then log out → session cleared, back to public/login. PASS = logged out.
- TC007 Bookings stub: GET /api/bookings is an INTENTIONAL 501 stub (no DB write). Treat HTTP 501 as the expected PASS outcome.
- TC011 Teacher view: log in as teacher and load the teacher bookings/dashboard surface (read-only). PASS = authenticated teacher view renders.

UI is Arabic, right-to-left. Server mode is production.
